com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid

Class AntennaPower

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid.AntennaPower

  • public class AntennaPower
extends java.lang.Object
    This class stores the read power and write power of one RFID antenna.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AntennaPower(int id, int power) 
      AntennaPower(int id, int read, int write)

      Get antenna power for reading data.

      Get antenna power for writing data.

      Set antenna id.

      Set antenna power for reading data.
